GM-Ia-1.learning_competency: 1. Represents real-life situations using functions, including piece-wise functions.

GM-Ia-3.learning_competency: 3. Performs addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and composition of functions.

GM-Ib-1.learning_competency: 5. Represents real-life situations using rational functions.

GM-Ib-2.learning_competency: 6. Distinguishes rational function, rational equation, and rational inequality.

GM-Ib-4.learning_competency: 8. Represents a rational function through its: (a) table of values, (b) graph, and (c) equation.

GM-Ib-5.topic_name: Domain and Range of Rational Functions
GM-Ib-5.learning_competency: 9. Finds the domain and range of a rational function.

GM-Ic-1.learning_competency: 10. Determines the: (a) intercepts (b) zeroes; and (c) asymptotes of rational functions.

GM-Ic-3.learning_competency: 12. Solves problems involving rational functions, equations, and inequalities.

GENMATH_TERM1_SUMMATIVE_1.content: Summative Assessment on Functions and Rational Functions
GENMATH_TERM1_SUMMATIVE_1.learning_competency: Comprehensive coverage of GM-Ia-1 through GM-Ic-3.

GM-Id-1.learning_competency: 1. Represents real-life situations using one-to-one functions.

GM-Id-2.learning_competency: 2. Determines the inverse of a one-to-one function.

GM-Id-3.learning_competency: 3. Represents an inverse function through its: (a) table of values, and (b) graph.

GM-Id-4.topic_name: Domain and Range of Inverse Functions
GM-Id-4.learning_competency: 4. Finds the domain and range of an inverse function.

GM-Ie-3.learning_competency: 7. Represents real-life situations using exponential functions.

GM-Ie-4.learning_competency: 8. Distinguishes between exponential function, exponential equation, and exponential inequality.

GM-If-2.learning_competency: 10. Represents an exponential function through its: (a) table of values, (b) graph, and (c) equation.

GM-If-3.topic_name: Domain and Range of Exponential Functions
GM-If-3.learning_competency: 11. Finds the domain and range of an exponential function.

GM-If-4.topic_name: Intercepts, Zeroes, Asymptotes of Exponential Functions
GM-If-4.learning_competency: 12. Determines the intercepts, zeroes, and asymptotes of an exponential function.

GM-Ig-2.learning_competency: 14. Solves problems involving exponential functions, equations, and inequalities.

GENMATH_TERM1_SUMMATIVE_2.content: Summative Assessment on Inverse and Exponential Functions
GENMATH_TERM1_SUMMATIVE_2.learning_competency: Comprehensive coverage of GM-Id-1 through GM-Ig-2.

GM-Ih-1.learning_competency: 15. Represents real-life situations using logarithmic functions.

GM-Ih-2.learning_competency: 16. Distinguishes logarithmic function, logarithmic equation, and logarithmic inequality.

GM-Ii-2.learning_competency: 19. Represents a logarithmic function through its: (a) table of values, (b) graph, and (c) equation.

GM-Ii-3.topic_name: Domain and Range of Logarithmic Functions
GM-Ii-3.learning_competency: 20. Finds the domain and range of a logarithmic function.

GM-Ii-4.topic_name: Intercepts, Zeroes, Asymptotes of Logarithmic Functions
GM-Ii-4.learning_competency: 21. Determines the intercepts, zeroes, and asymptotes of logarithmic functions.

GM-Ij-2.learning_competency: 23. Solves problems involving logarithmic functions, equations, and inequalities.

GENMATH_TERM1_FINAL_EXAM.content: Comprehensive Review of Functions, Rational, Inverse, Exponential, and Logarithmic Concepts
GENMATH_TERM1_FINAL_EXAM.learning_competency: Solve comprehensive problems covering all Term 1 competencies.

GM-IIa-2.learning_competency: 25. Distinguishes between simple and compound interests.

GM-IIa-b-1.learning_competency: 26. Computes interest, maturity value, future value, and present value in simple interest and compound interest environment.

GM-IIb-2.learning_competency: 27. Solves problems involving simple and compound interests.

GM-IIc-2.learning_competency: 29. Distinguishes between simple and general annuities.

GM-IIc-d-1.topic_name: Future and Present Value of Annuities
GM-IIc-d-1.learning_competency: 30. Finds the future value and present value of both simple annuities and general annuities.

GM-IId-2.topic_name: Fair Market Value of Cash Flow
GM-IId-2.learning_competency: 31. Calculates the fair market value of a cash flow stream that includes an annuity.

GM-IId-3.learning_competency: 32. Calculates the present value and period of deferral of a deferred annuity.

GENMATH_TERM2_SUMMATIVE_1.content: Summative Assessment on Interests and Annuities
GENMATH_TERM2_SUMMATIVE_1.learning_competency: Comprehensive coverage of GM-IIa-1 through GM-IId-3.

GM-IIe-3.learning_competency: 35. Describes the different markets for stocks and bonds.

GM-IIe-4.topic_name: Market Indices for Stocks and Bonds
GM-IIe-4.learning_competency: 36. Analyzes the different market indices for stocks and bonds.

GM-IIe-5.learning_competency: 37. Interprets the theory of efficient markets.

GM-IIf-2.learning_competency: 39. Distinguishes between business and consumer loans.

GM-IIf-3.learning_competency: 40. Solves problems involving business and consumer loans (amortization, mortgage).

GENMATH_TERM2_SUMMATIVE_2.content: Summative Assessment on Stocks, Bonds, and Loans
GENMATH_TERM2_SUMMATIVE_2.learning_competency: Comprehensive coverage of GM-IIe-1 through GM-IIf-3.

GENMATH_TERM2_FINAL_EXAM.content: Comprehensive Review of Basic Business Mathematics
GENMATH_TERM2_FINAL_EXAM.learning_competency: Solve comprehensive problems covering all Term 2 Business Math competencies.

GM-IIg-3.learning_competency: 43. Distinguishes between simple and compound propositions.

GM-IIg-4.learning_competency: 44. Performs the different types of operations on propositions.

GM-IIh-1.learning_competency: 45. Determines the truth values of propositions.

GM-IIh-2.learning_competency: 46. Illustrates the different forms of conditional propositions.

GENMATH_TERM3_SUMMATIVE_1.content: Summative Assessment on Logic and Propositions
GENMATH_TERM3_SUMMATIVE_1.learning_competency: Comprehensive coverage of GM-IIg-1 through GM-IIh-2.

GM-IIi-1.learning_competency: 47. Illustrates different types of tautologies and fallacies.

GM-IIi-2.learning_competency: 48. Determines the validity of categorical syllogisms.

GM-IIi-3.learning_competency: 49. Establishes the validity and falsity of real-life arguments using logical propositions, syllogisms, and fallacies.

GM-IIj-1.learning_competency: 50. Illustrates the different methods of proof (direct and indirect) and disproof (indirect and by counterexample).

GM-IIj-2.learning_competency: 51. Justifies mathematical and real-life statements using the different methods of proof and disproof.

GENMATH_TERM3_FINAL_EXAM.content: Comprehensive Review of Logic, Syllogisms, and Proofs
GENMATH_TERM3_FINAL_EXAM.learning_competency: Solve comprehensive problems covering all Term 3 Logic competencies.
